author: w3Lb
content: Delivered in commit 9ae34cf. Streaming path live: defaults.stream_min_bytes config (256MiB default, 0=off; tests use tiny values), eligibility = no undo entry + line-scoped op + no BOM; per-line terminator passthrough; persist-only-on-change; backup-before-persist; mid-stream errors leave original untouched. MEASURED: 5.8MB peak RSS vs 454MB buffered on the same 64MiB edit — constant memory, files>RAM editable. FileOutcome gained notes + total_line_changes (display sample capped at 50, counts exact). BUG CAUGHT BY TEST: single-file runs took the sequential loop and never streamed — non-confirm runs now all use the worker path. BENCHMARKS.md republished with the full optimization series: big-file 6x loss -> parity with sed (softened the earlier 'faster than sed' single-run claim — full-run means overlap within WSL2 noise). 4 e2e tests + config test. 25 suites green, clippy/fmt clean.
